mapper.sql: ala.id, ala.oa_order, ala.nick_name, ala.user_name, ala.user_department, ala.user_section, ala.groups, ala.position, ala.reason, ala.total_number, ala.hr_total, ala.version, ala.to_be_uploaded_flag, ala.approval_node, ala.approval_employee, ala.approval_result, ala.enabled_flag, ala.attribute1, ala.attribute2, ala.attribute3, ala.attribute4, ala.attribute5, ala.create_by, ala.create_time, alal.leave_type, alal.start_time, alal.end_time, alal.number, alal.work_number

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.oa_order as ${tAlias}_oa_order, ${tAlias}.nick_name as ${tAlias}_nick_name, ${tAlias}.user_name as ${tAlias}_user_name, ${tAlias}.user_department as ${tAlias}_user_department, ${tAlias}.user_section as ${tAlias}_user_section, ${tAlias}.groups as ${tAlias}_groups, ${tAlias}.position as ${tAlias}_position, ${tAlias}.reason as ${tAlias}_reason, ${tAlias}.total_number as ${tAlias}_total_number, ${tAlias}.hr_total as ${tAlias}_hr_total, ${tAlias}.modify_reason as ${tAlias}_modify_reason, ${tAlias}.version as ${tAlias}_version, ${tAlias}.to_be_uploaded_flag as ${tAlias}_to_be_uploaded_flag, ${tAlias}.approval_node as ${tAlias}_approval_node, ${tAlias}.approval_employee as ${tAlias}_approval_employee, ${tAlias}.approval_result as ${tAlias}_approval_result, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time

select
from ac_leave_application ala inner join ac_leave_application_line alal on ala.oa_order = alal.oa_order and ala.version = alal.version

where 1 = 1
and (ala.user_name = #{criteria.user_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR ala.create_by = #{criteria.user_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
and ala.approval_result = #{criteria.approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and alal.start_time >= #{criteria.beginDate, jdbcType = DATE} and alal.start_time <= #{criteria.endDate, jdbcType = DATE}
and 1 = 1
and (ala.approval_result = 'Pass' or ala.approval_result = 'notPass' or ala.approval_result = 'Cancel')
and ala.approval_result is null
and (ala.version = 0 or ala.modify_reason is null)
and ala.version > 0
AND ( alal.leave_type != '事假' AND alal.leave_type != '年假' AND alal.leave_type != '调休' )
mapper.insert: insert into ac_leave_application (oa_order, nick_name, user_name, user_department, user_section, groups, position, reason, total_number, hr_total, modify_reason, version, to_be_uploaded_flag, approval_node, approval_employee, approval_result, enabled_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, create_by, create_time) values (#{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userSection,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{groups,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{position,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalNumber,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{hrTotal,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{modify_reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{to_be_uploaded_flag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{approvalNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalEmployee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO ac_leave_application (oa_order, nick_name, user_name, user_department, user_section, groups, position, reason, total_number, version, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{oa_order}, #{nick_name}, #{user_name}, #{user_department}, #{user_section}, #{groups}, #{position}, #{reason}, #{total_number}, 0, #{create_by}, GETDATE())

INSERT INTO ac_leave_application_line (oa_order, leave_type, start_time, end_time, number, version, work_number, create_by, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.oa_order}, #{item.leave_type}, CONVERT(datetime, #{item.start_time}), CONVERT(datetime, #{item.end_time}), CONVERT(float, #{item.total_number}), 0, CONVERT(float, #{item.work_number}), #{item.create_by}, GETDATE())

INSERT INTO ac_leave_application_line (oa_order, leave_type, start_time, end_time, number, version, work_number, create_by, hr_nick_name, hr_time, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.oa_order}, #{item.leave_type}, CONVERT(datetime, #{item.start_time}), CONVERT(datetime, #{item.end_time}), #{item.total_number}, #{item.version}, #{item.work_number}, #{item.create_by}, #{item.hr_nick_name}, #{item.modify_time}, GETDATE())

insert into ac_leave_management(dept_id, team_leader_job_id, department_head_job_id, manger_job_id, leader_job_id, team_authorize_work_card, department_authorize_work_card, manger_authorize_work_card, leader_authorize_work_card, enabled_flag) values (#{deptId}, #{teamLeaderJobId},#{departmentHeadJobId},#{mangerJobId},#{leaderJobId},#{teamAuthorizeWorkCard}, #{departmentAuthorizeWorkCard}, #{mangerAuthorizeWorkCard}, #{leaderAuthorizeWorkCard},#{enabled_flag})
mapper.update: update ac_leave_application set enabled_flag = 0 where oa_order = #{oaOrder}
update ac_leave_application_line set enabled_flag = 0 where oa_order = #{oaOrder}

update ac_leave_application set oa_order = #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nick_name = #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_department = #{userDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_section = #{userSection,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, groups = #{groups,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, position = #{position,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, total_number = #{totalNumber,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, hr_total = #{hrTotal,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, modify_reason = #{modify_reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, to_be_uploaded_flag = #{to_be_uploaded_flag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, approval_node = #{approvalNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_employee = #{approvalEmployee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_result = #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=BIGINT}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select ala.id, ala.oa_order, ala.nick_name, ala.user_name, ala.user_department, ala.user_section, ala.groups, ala.position, ala.reason, ala.total_number, ala.hr_total, ala.version, ala.to_be_uploaded_flag, ala.approval_node, ala.approval_employee, ala.approval_result, ala.enabled_flag, ala.attribute1, ala.attribute2, ala.attribute3, ala.attribute4, ala.attribute5, ala.create_by, ala.create_time from ac_leave_application ala where ala.id=#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
order by id

select pe.work_card as workCard, pe.name as name, (select temp.dept_name from fnd_dept temp where fd.ext_dept_id = temp.id) as deptName, (select temp.dept_name from fnd_dept temp where fd.ext_department_id = temp.id) as department, (select temp.dept_name from fnd_dept temp where fd.ext_team_id = temp.id) as groupName, (select temp.dept_name from fnd_dept temp where fd.ext_dept_id = temp.id) as DName, (select fj.job_name from fnd_job fj where fj.id = pej.job_id and fj.enabled_flag = 1 and fj.deleted_flag = 0) as position, pe.email_inside as Email_NB from pm_employee pe join pm_employee_job pej on pe.id = pej.employee_id left join fnd_dept fd on pej.dept_id = fd.id where pe.enabled_flag =1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.deleted_flag = 0 and pe.work_card = #{workCard}

SELECT pe.work_card AS workCard, pe.name AS nickname, pe.ext_dept_name AS deptName, pe.name + '|' + pe.job_name AS employeeName, pe.job_name AS positionName, ISNULL(pe.ext_department_name, '') AS section FROM v_employee_job_dept pe INNER JOIN ac_emp_depts ed ON pe.employee_id = ed.employee_id INNER JOIN fnd_dept_ext_v fd ON ed.dept_id = fd.id WHERE pe.enabled_flag = 1 AND pe.leave_flag = 0 AND ed.data_type = 'team' AND ed.enabled_flag = 1 AND ed.role_id = 17 AND fd.ext_dept_name = #{deptName,javaType=String,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND fd.ext_department_name = #{section,javaType=String,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND fd.ext_team_name = #{group,javaType=String,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY pe.ext_dept_name, pe.job_name DESC

SELECT pe.work_card AS workCard, pe.name AS nickname, pe.ext_dept_name AS deptName, pe.name + '|' + pe.job_name AS employeeName, pe.job_name AS positionName, ISNULL(pe.ext_department_name, '') AS section FROM v_employee_job_dept pe WHERE pe.enabled_flag = 1 AND pe.leave_flag = 0 AND pe.ext_dept_name = #{deptName,javaType=String,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND pe.ext_department_name = #{section,javaType=String,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND pe.job_name = '主管'

SELECT pe.work_card AS workCard, pe.name AS nickname, pe.ext_dept_name AS deptName, pe.name + '|' + pe.job_name AS employeeName, pe.job_name AS positionName, ISNULL(pe.ext_department_name, '') AS section FROM v_employee_job_dept pe WHERE pe.enabled_flag = 1 AND pe.leave_flag = 0 AND pe.ext_dept_name = #{deptName,javaType=String,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (pe.job_name = '经理' OR pe.job_name = '事业部经理') order by pe.ext_dept_name, pe.ext_department_name desc

SELECT ISNULL(SUM(alasub.work_number),0 ) as usedday FROM ac_leave_application as ala INNER JOIN ac_leave_application_line as alasub ON ala.oa_order = alasub.oa_order and ala.version = alasub.version WHERE ala.enabled_flag = 1 AND alasub.version = ala.version AND (ala.approval_result = 'Pass' OR ala.approval_result IS NULL OR ala.approval_result = 'pass') AND alasub.enabled_flag = 1 AND alasub.leave_type = '年假' AND YEAR ( alasub.start_time) = YEAR (GETDATE()) AND ala.user_name = #{workCard}

SELECT ISNULL( SUM ( alasub.work_number ), 0 ) AS usedday FROM ac_leave_application as ala INNER JOIN ac_leave_application_line as alasub ON ala.oa_order = alasub.oa_order and ala.version = alasub.version WHERE ala.enabled_flag = 1 AND (ala.approval_result = 'Pass' OR ala.approval_result IS NULL OR ala.approval_result = 'pass') AND alasub.enabled_flag = 1 AND alasub.leave_type = '事假' AND alasub.version = ala.version AND YEAR ( alasub.start_time) = YEAR (GETDATE()) AND ala.user_name = #{workCard}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ac_leave_application as ala INNER JOIN ac_leave_application_line as alasub ON ala.oa_order = alasub.oa_order WHERE ala.enabled_flag = 1 AND alasub.enabled_flag = 1 AND (ala.approval_result = 'Pass' OR ala.approval_result IS NULL OR ala.approval_result = 'pass') AND ala.user_name = #{workCard} AND (alasub.start_time = #{start_time} OR alasub.end_time = #{end_time}) and ala.hr_total != 0

SELECT ala.oa_order, ala.nick_name, ala.user_name, ala.user_department, ala.user_section, ala.groups, ala.position, ala.reason, ala.total_number, ala.hr_total, ala.modify_reason, ala.to_be_uploaded_flag, ala.approval_node, ala.approval_employee, ala.enabled_flag, ala.create_by, ala.create_time, alasub.leave_type, CONVERT(varchar, alasub.start_time, 120) AS 'start_time', CONVERT(varchar, alasub.end_time, 120) AS 'end_time', alasub.number, alasub.version, alasub.work_number, alasub.hr_nick_name, CONVERT(varchar, alasub.hr_time, 120) AS 'hr_time', alasub.enabled_flag FROM ac_leave_application as ala INNER JOIN ac_leave_application_line as alasub ON ala.oa_order = alasub.oa_order WHERE ala.enabled_flag = 1 AND alasub.version = ala.version AND alasub.enabled_flag = 1 AND (ala.approval_result = 'Pass' OR ala.approval_result IS NULL OR ala.approval_result = 'pass') AND ala.hr_total != 0 AND ala.user_name = #{workCard} AND alasub.start_time > #{endTime} ORDER BY alasub.start_time ASC

SELECT ala.oa_order, ala.nick_name, ala.user_name, ala.user_department, ala.user_section, ala.groups, ala.position, ala.reason, ala.total_number, ala.hr_total, ala.modify_reason, ala.to_be_uploaded_flag, ala.approval_node, ala.approval_employee, ala.enabled_flag, ala.create_by, ala.create_time, alasub.leave_type, CONVERT(varchar, alasub.start_time, 120) AS 'start_time', CONVERT(varchar, alasub.end_time, 120) AS 'end_time', alasub.number, alasub.version, alasub.work_number, alasub.hr_nick_name, CONVERT(varchar, alasub.hr_time, 120) AS 'hr_time', alasub.enabled_flag FROM ac_leave_application as ala INNER JOIN ac_leave_application_line as alasub ON ala.oa_order = alasub.oa_order WHERE ala.enabled_flag = 1 AND alasub.version = ala.version AND alasub.enabled_flag = 1 AND (ala.approval_result = 'Pass' OR ala.approval_result IS NULL OR ala.approval_result = 'pass') AND ala.hr_total != 0 AND ala.user_name = #{workCard} AND alasub.end_time < #{startTime} ORDER BY alasub.end_time DESC

SELECT ala.oa_order, ala.nick_name, ala.user_name, ala.user_department, ala.user_section, ala.groups, ala.position, ala.reason, ala.total_number, ala.hr_total, ala.modify_reason, ala.to_be_uploaded_flag, ala.approval_node, ala.approval_employee, ala.enabled_flag, ala.create_by, ala.create_time, alasub.leave_type, CONVERT(varchar, alasub.start_time, 120) AS 'start_time', CONVERT(varchar, alasub.end_time, 120) AS 'end_time', alasub.number, alasub.version, alasub.work_number, alasub.hr_nick_name, CONVERT(varchar, alasub.hr_time, 120) AS 'hr_time', alasub.enabled_flag FROM ac_leave_application as ala INNER JOIN ac_leave_application_line as alasub ON ala.oa_order = alasub.oa_order WHERE ala.enabled_flag = 1 AND alasub.version = ala.version AND alasub.enabled_flag = 1 AND (ala.approval_result = 'Pass' OR ala.approval_result IS NULL OR ala.approval_result = 'pass') and ala.hr_total != 0 AND ala.user_name = #{workCard} ORDER BY alasub.start_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ac_calendar_line WHERE now_date between #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND day_off_flag = 1 and enabled_flag = 1 and calendar_header_id in (select id from ac_calendar_header where calendar_name='默认日历')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ac_calendar_line WHERE now_date > #{startTime} AND now_date < #{endTime} AND day_off_flag = 1 and enabled_flag = 1 and calendar_header_id in (select id from ac_calendar_header where calendar_name='默认日历')

SELECT alal.id AS id, ala.user_name AS workCard, CONVERT(varchar(19), alal.start_time, 120) AS startTime, CONVERT(varchar(19), alal.end_time, 120) AS endTime FROM ac_leave_application ala JOIN ac_leave_application_line alal ON ala.oa_order = alal.oa_order WHERE ala.enabled_flag = 1 AND ala.approval_result = 'Pass' AND (ala.hr_total != 0 OR ala.hr_total IS NULL) AND ( (alal.start_time >= CAST(#{dateFrom, jdbcType = DATE} AS DATETIME) AND alal.start_time < DATEADD(DAY, 1, CAST(#{dateTo, jdbcType = DATE} AS DATETIME))) OR (alal.end_time >= CAST(#{dateFrom, jdbcType = DATE} AS DATETIME) AND alal.end_time < DATEADD(DAY, 1, CAST(#{dateTo, jdbcType = DATE} AS DATETIME))) OR (alal.start_time < CAST(#{dateFrom, jdbcType = DATE} AS DATETIME) AND alal.end_time >= CAST(#{dateTo, jdbcType = DATE} AS DATETIME)) )

SELECT TOP (1) id as ID, oa_order as requisitionCode,nick_name as nickName ,user_name as userName,user_department as userDepartment, user_section as userSection , groups as groups ,position as posiTion, reason as reason , hr_total as hrTotal, isnull(modify_reason,'') as modify, version as version , to_be_uploaded_flag as toBeUploadedFlag,enabled_flag as enabledFlag, CONVERT(VARCHAR,create_time,120) as createtime ,total_number as totalNumber FROM ac_leave_application where oa_order = #{reqCode} order by createtime desc

SELECT id as ID,CONVERT(VARCHAR,end_time,120) as endTime,hr_nick_name as hrNickName, hr_time as hrTime, leave_type as leaveType, number as number , oa_order as requisitionCode, CONVERT(VARCHAR,start_time,120) as startTime ,version as version, work_number as workNumber FROM ac_leave_application_line where oa_order = #{reqCode} order by version desc
mapper.update: update ac_leave_management set team_leader_job_id=#{team_leader_job_id}, team_leader_employee_id=#{team_leader_id}, department_head_job_id=#{department_head_job_id}, department_head_employee_id=#{department_head_id}, manger_job_id=#{manger_job_id}, manger_employee_id=#{manger_id}, leader_job_id=#{leader_job_id}, leader_employee_id=#{leader_id}, team_authorize_work_card=#{teamAuthorizeWorkCard}, department_authorize_work_card=#{departmentAuthorizeWorkCard}, manger_authorize_work_card=#{mangerAuthorizeWorkCard}, leader_authorize_work_card=#{leaderAuthorizeWorkCard} where id=#{id} and dept_id = #{deptId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ac_leave_application ala where oa_order = #{oa_order} and ala.enabled_flag = 1

SELECT distinct alal.id,leave_type,start_time,end_time,number,work_number FROM ac_leave_application_line alal inner join ac_leave_application ala on ala.version = alal.version and ala.oa_order = alal.oa_order where ala.oa_order = #{oa_order} and ala.enabled_flag = 1 and alal.enabled_flag = 1

-- SELECT ISNULL(SUM(pla.total_number), 0) as usedday SELECT ISNULL(SUM(plasub.number), 0) as usedday FROM ac_leave_application as pla INNER JOIN ac_leave_application_line as plasub ON pla.oa_order = plasub.oa_order and pla.version = plasub.version WHERE pla.enabled_flag = 1 AND (pla.approval_result = 'Pass' OR pla.approval_result IS NULL OR pla.approval_result = 'pass') AND plasub.enabled_flag = 1 AND plasub.leave_type = '育儿假' AND plasub.version = pla.version AND plasub.start_time >= #{childDate} AND plasub.start_time < DATEADD(year, 1, #{endDate}) AND pla.user_name = #{workCard}

SELECT count(1) FROM ac_leave_application as pla INNER JOIN ac_leave_application_line as plasub ON pla.oa_order = plasub.oa_order WHERE pla.enabled_flag = 1 AND (pla.approval_result = 'Pass' OR pla.approval_result IS NULL OR pla.approval_result = 'pass') AND plasub.enabled_flag = 1 AND plasub.leave_type = '育儿假' AND plasub.version = pla.version AND plasub.start_time >= #{childDate} AND plasub.start_time < DATEADD(year, 1, #{endDate}) AND pla.user_name = #{workCard}

select ala.id, ala.oa_order, ala.nick_name, ala.user_name, ala.user_department, ala.user_section, ala.groups, ala.position, ala.reason, ala.total_number, ala.hr_total, ala.version, ala.to_be_uploaded_flag, ala.approval_node, ala.approval_employee, ala.approval_result, ala.enabled_flag, ala.attribute1, ala.attribute2, ala.attribute3, ala.attribute4, ala.attribute5, ala.create_by, ala.create_time from ac_leave_application ala where ala.user_name = #{workCard} order by ala.id

-- SELECT ISNULL(SUM(ala.total_number), 0) as usedday SELECT ISNULL(SUM(alasub.number), 0) as usedday FROM ac_leave_application as ala INNER JOIN ac_leave_application_line as alasub ON ala.oa_order = alasub.oa_order and ala.version = alasub.version WHERE ala.enabled_flag = 1 AND (ala.approval_result = 'Pass' OR ala.approval_result IS NULL OR ala.approval_result = 'pass') AND alasub.enabled_flag = 1 AND alasub.leave_type = '护理假' AND alasub.version = ala.version AND YEAR ( alasub.start_time) = YEAR (GETDATE()) AND ala.user_name = #{workCard}

SELECT count(1) FROM ac_leave_application as ala INNER JOIN ac_leave_application_line as alasub ON ala.oa_order = alasub.oa_order WHERE ala.enabled_flag = 1 AND (ala.approval_result = 'Pass' OR ala.approval_result IS NULL OR ala.approval_result = 'pass') AND alasub.enabled_flag = 1 AND alasub.leave_type = '护理假' AND alasub.version = ala.version AND YEAR ( alasub.start_time) = YEAR (GETDATE()) AND ala.user_name = #{workCard}

SELECT DISTINCT temp.dept_name AS departmentName, pej.dept_id AS departmentId FROM ( SELECT MAX ( id ) AS id, MAX ( dept_name ) AS dept_name FROM fnd_dept WHERE enabled_flag = 1 AND deleted_flag = 0 GROUP BY ext_dept_id ) temp JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON temp.id = pej.dept_id JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id = pe.id WHERE pe.enabled_flag = 1 AND pej.job_main_flag = 1 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1

select pe.work_card AS gph, pe.name AS xm, pe.ext_dept_name as szbm,pe.ext_dept_id as bmbh, pe.ext_department_name as szks,pe.ext_department_id as ksbh, pe.ext_team_name as szbz,pe.ext_team_id as bzbh, pe.job_name as gwmc,pe.job_id as gwbh, pe.ext_dept_name as bmmc from v_employee_job_dept pe where pe.enabled_flag=1 and pe.leave_flag=0 and pe.ext_dept_id=#{departmentID} order by pe.work_card desc

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(aoal.review_hours), 0) AS monthOverTime FROM ac_overtime_application as aoa JOIN ac_overtime_application_line aoal ON aoa.oa_order = aoal.oa_order INNER JOIN ac_calendar_line acl ON acl.now_date = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), aoal.start_time,120) where aoa.enabled_flag = 1 and aoal.enabled_flag = 1 AND aoal.start_time >= DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, GETDATE()), 0) AND aoal.end_time <= GETDATE() AND (approval_result = 'Pass' OR approval_result = 'pass') AND aoa.user_name = #{work_card} AND acl.day_off_flag=1

-- SELECT ISNULL(SUM(pla.total_number), 0) as usedday SELECT ISNULL(SUM(plasub.number), 0) as usedday FROM ac_leave_application as pla INNER JOIN ac_leave_application_line as plasub ON pla.oa_order = plasub.oa_order and pla.version = plasub.version WHERE pla.enabled_flag = 1 AND (pla.approval_result = 'Pass' OR pla.approval_result IS NULL OR pla.approval_result = 'pass') AND plasub.enabled_flag = 1 AND plasub.leave_type = '调休' AND plasub.version = pla.version AND plasub.start_time >= DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, GETDATE()), 0) AND plasub.start_time <= GETDATE() AND pla.user_name = #{workCard}
SELECT DISTINCT name, work_card FROM ac_overtime_limit where dept_name = #{department} or department_name = #{administrativeOffice}
select TOP 1 * from ac_leave_application where oa_order = #{oaOrder} AND enabled_flag = 1 order by create_time, version desc
select TOP 1 * from ac_leave_application_line where oa_order = #{oaOrder} and enabled_flag = 1 order by create_time desc
select parent_id from fnd_dept fd where dept_name=#{dept_name}

select pe.name,pe.work_card, fd.dept_level,fd.parent_id from pm_employee_job pej left join pm_employee pe on pej.employee_id=pe.id left join fnd_dept fd on fd.admin_job_id=pej.job_id where fd.id=#{parentID} and pe.leave_flag=0
select * from fnd_job fd left join pm_employee_job pej on fd.id=pej.job_id left join pm_employee pe on pej.employee_id=pe.id where fd.dept_id=65
select * from fnd_job fd left join pm_employee_job pej on fd.id=pej.job_id left join pm_employee pe on pej.employee_id=pe.id where fd.job_name='人事专员'
select pe.email_inside from fnd_job fd left join pm_employee_job pej on fd.id=pej.job_id left join pm_employee pe on pej.employee_id=pe.id where fd.dept_id=65
select pe.email_inside from fnd_job fd left join pm_employee_job pej on fd.id=pej.job_id left join pm_employee pe on pej.employee_id=pe.id where fd.job_name='人事专员'

SELECT alm.id, alm.dept_id, fd.dept_name, alm.enabled_flag, alm.team_leader_employee_id, alm.department_head_employee_id, alm.manger_employee_id, alm.leader_employee_id, alm.team_authorize_work_card, alm.department_authorize_work_card, alm.manger_authorize_work_card, alm.leader_authorize_work_card FROM ac_leave_management alm INNER join fnd_dept fd on alm.dept_id=fd.id where fd.id = #{deptId} ORDER BY alm.id

SELECT TOP 1 alm.dept_id, alm.team_leader_employee_id, alm.department_head_employee_id, alm.manger_employee_id, alm.leader_employee_id, fd.dept_name FROM fnd_dept fd LEFT JOIN ac_leave_management alm ON alm.dept_id= fd.id WHERE alm.dept_id= #{deptId} AND fd.enabled_flag = 1

SELECT TOP 1 alm.dept_id, alm.team_leader_employee_id, alm.department_head_employee_id, alm.manger_employee_id, alm.leader_employee_id, fd.dept_name FROM fnd_dept fd LEFT JOIN ac_leave_management alm ON alm.dept_id= fd.id WHERE alm.dept_id= #{deptId} AND fd.enabled_flag = 1

SELECT TOP 1 alm.dept_id, alm.team_leader_employee_id, alm.department_head_employee_id, alm.manger_employee_id, alm.leader_employee_id, fd.dept_name FROM fnd_dept fd LEFT JOIN ac_leave_management alm ON alm.dept_id= fd.id WHERE alm.dept_id= #{deptId} AND fd.enabled_flag = 1

SELECT TOP 1 alm.dept_id, alm.team_leader_employee_id, alm.department_head_employee_id, alm.manger_employee_id, alm.leader_employee_id, fd.dept_name FROM fnd_dept fd LEFT JOIN ac_leave_management alm ON alm.dept_id= fd.id WHERE alm.dept_id= #{deptId} AND fd.enabled_flag = 1

SELECT alm.id, alm.dept_id, fd.dept_name, alm.enabled_flag, alm.team_leader_employee_id, alm.department_head_employee_id, alm.manger_employee_id, alm.leader_employee_id, alm.team_authorize_work_card, alm.department_authorize_work_card, alm.manger_authorize_work_card, alm.leader_authorize_work_card FROM ac_leave_management alm INNER join fnd_dept fd on alm.dept_id=fd.id where alm.id=#{id} and alm.dept_id = #{deptId}
select TOP 1 fd.id from fnd_dept as fd inner JOIN pm_employee_job as pej ON fd.id = pej.dept_id where fd.dept_name = #{deptName} and pej.attribute1 = #{department}

SELECT alm.id, alm.dept_id, fd.dept_name, alm.enabled_flag, alm.team_leader_employee_id, alm.department_head_employee_id, alm.manger_employee_id, alm.leader_employee_id, alm.team_authorize_work_card, alm.department_authorize_work_card, alm.manger_authorize_work_card, alm.leader_authorize_work_card FROM ac_leave_management alm INNER JOIN fnd_dept fd ON alm.dept_id= fd.id WHERE alm.dept_id = #{deptId} and fd.enabled_flag = 1

select pej.dept_id from pm_employee_job pej left join pm_employee pe on pej.employee_id=pe.id left join fnd_dept fd on fd.id=pej.dept_id where pe.work_card=#{workCard} and pe.leave_flag=0 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1

select DISTINCT department_authorize_work_card, pe.work_card as username,pe.name as nickname FROM fnd_dept fd INNER join ac_leave_management alm on alm.dept_id=fd.id INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON alm.department_head_job_id=pej.job_id INNER JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.id=pej.employee_id where alm.dept_id=#{deptId} and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag=0 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1

select manger_authorize_work_card, pe.work_card as username,pe.name as nickname FROM fnd_dept fd left join ac_leave_management alm on alm.dept_id=fd.id LEFT JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON alm.manger_job_id=pej.job_id LEFT JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.id=pej.employee_id where alm.dept_id=#{deptId} and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag=0 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1

select leader_authorize_work_card, pe.work_card as username,pe.name as nickname FROM fnd_dept fd left join ac_leave_management alm on alm.dept_id=fd.id LEFT JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON alm.leader_job_id=pej.job_id LEFT JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.id=pej.employee_id where alm.dept_id=#{deptId} and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag=0 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1

select leader_authorize_work_card, pe.work_card as username,pe.name as nickname FROM fnd_dept fd left join ac_leave_management alm on alm.dept_id=fd.id LEFT JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON alm.leader_job_id=pej.job_id LEFT JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.id=pej.employee_id where alm.dept_id=#{deptId} and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag=0 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1

SELECT DISTINCT fd.id as dept_id, pej.dept_name, pe.work_card AS username, pe.name AS nickname FROM fnd_dept fd INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON fd.id= pej.dept_id INNER JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.id= pej.employee_id where job_name like '代理主管' and fd.id = #{deptId} and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pej.enabled_flag = 1

SELECT DISTINCT fd.id as dept_id, pej.dept_name, pe.work_card AS username, pe.name AS nickname FROM fnd_dept fd INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON fd.id= pej.dept_id INNER JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.id= pej.employee_id where job_name like '主管' and fd.id = #{deptId} and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pej.enabled_flag = 1
select * from ac_leave_application_line where oa_order = #{oaOrder} and enabled_flag = 1 and hr_nick_name != '' order by create_time desc
select * from ac_leave_application_line where oa_order = #{oaOrder} and enabled_flag = 1 and hr_nick_name != '' order by create_time desc

select TOP 1 pe.email_inside, pe.name from fnd_job fd INNER join pm_employee_job pej on fd.id=pej.job_id left join pm_employee pe on pej.employee_id=pe.id where pe.work_card = #{mailUser} AND pe.leave_flag = 0
SELECT TOP 1 nick_name as name FROM ac_leave_application where oa_order = #{oaOrder}
SELECT name FROM pm_employee as pe WHERE work_card = #{workCard} and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pe.enabled_flag = 1

SELECT DISTINCT pe.name, pe.work_card, aea.regimea_date, aea.first_time_from, aea.first_time_to, aea.extend1_time_flag, aea.second_time_from, aea.second_time_to, aea.extend2_time_flag, aea.third_time_from, aea.third_time_to, aea.extend3_time_flag, aea.rest_day_flag, aea.enabled_flag FROM pm_employee pe JOIN ac_calendar_header ach ON ach.default_flag = 1 JOIN ac_calendar_line acl ON ach.id = acl.calendar_header_id JOIN ac_employee_attendance aea ON aea.employee_id = pe.id WHERE pe.work_card = #{workCard} AND regimea_date = #{startTime} AND aea.enabled_flag = 1 order by regimea_date desc

SELECT DISTINCT pe.name, pe.work_card, aea.regimea_date, aea.first_time_from, aea.first_time_to, aea.extend1_time_flag, aea.second_time_from, aea.second_time_to, aea.extend2_time_flag, aea.third_time_from, aea.third_time_to, aea.extend3_time_flag, aea.rest_day_flag, aea.enabled_flag FROM pm_employee pe JOIN ac_calendar_header ach ON ach.default_flag = 1 JOIN ac_calendar_line acl ON ach.id = acl.calendar_header_id JOIN ac_employee_attendance aea ON aea.employee_id = pe.id WHERE pe.work_card = #{workCard} AND regimea_date = #{endTime} AND aea.enabled_flag = 1 order by regimea_date desc

SELECT DISTINCT pe.name, pe.work_card, aea.regimea_date, aea.first_time_from, aea.first_time_to, aea.extend1_time_flag, aea.second_time_from, aea.second_time_to, aea.extend2_time_flag, aea.third_time_from, aea.third_time_to, aea.extend3_time_flag, aea.rest_day_flag, aea.enabled_flag FROM pm_employee pe JOIN ac_calendar_header ach ON ach.default_flag = 1 JOIN ac_calendar_line acl ON ach.id = acl.calendar_header_id JOIN ac_employee_attendance aea ON aea.employee_id = pe.id WHERE pe.work_card = #{workCard} AND regimea_date = #{formattedDate} AND aea.enabled_flag = 1 order by regimea_date desc
select workshop_attendance_flag FROM pm_employee where work_card = #{workCard}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT regimea_date) FROM pm_employee pe JOIN ac_calendar_header ach ON ach.default_flag = 1 JOIN ac_calendar_line acl ON ach.id = acl.calendar_header_id JOIN ac_employee_attendance aea ON aea.employee_id = pe.id WHERE pe.work_card = #{workCard} AND regimea_date > #{startDate} and regimea_date < #{endDate} AND aea.enabled_flag = 1 AND aea.rest_day_flag = 1

SELECT alm.id, alm.dept_id, fd.dept_name, alm.enabled_flag, alm.team_leader_employee_id, alm.department_head_employee_id, alm.manger_employee_id, alm.leader_employee_id, alm.team_authorize_work_card, alm.department_authorize_work_card, alm.manger_authorize_work_card, alm.leader_authorize_work_card FROM ac_leave_management alm INNER join fnd_dept fd on alm.dept_id=fd.id
select TOP 1 fd.id from fnd_dept as fd where fd.dept_name = #{department}
select TOP 1 fd.id from fnd_dept as fd where fd.dept_name = #{deptName}
select TOP 1 fd.id from fnd_dept as fd where fd.dept_name = #{department}
select TOP 1 pe.work_card from pm_employee pe where pe.id = #{teamLeaderEmployeeId} and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0
select TOP 1 pe.id from pm_employee pe where pe.work_card = #{work_card} and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0

SELECT TOP 1 CASE WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%班%' THEN fd1.id WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%科室%' THEN fd.id WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%部%' THEN fd1.id ELSE NULL -- 或者你可以设置默认值 END AS id FROM pm_employee pe INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = pej.dept_id LEFT JOIN fnd_dept fd1 ON fd1.id = fd.parent_id LEFT JOIN fnd_dept fd2 ON fd2.id = fd1.parent_id WHERE pe.work_card = #{workCard} and pej.job_main_flag = 1 AND pe.leave_flag = 0 AND pe.enabled_flag = 1 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1

select ala.id, ala.nick_name as NickName, ala.user_name as UserName, ala.oa_order as RequisitionCode, ala.approval_result as State, CONVERT(DATETIME, alal.start_time, 120) AS StartTime, CONVERT(DATETIME, alal.end_time, 120) AS EndTime, ala.reason as Reason, alal.leave_type as LeaveType, ala.create_time as CreateTime FROM ac_leave_application as ala INNER JOIN ac_leave_application_line as alal ON ala.oa_order = alal.oa_order and ala.version = alal.version where 1 = 1 and ala.oa_order = #{ oaOrder }

select ala.id, ala.nick_name as NickName, ala.user_name as UserName, ala.oa_order as RequisitionCode, ala.approval_result as State, CONVERT(DATETIME, alal.start_time, 120) AS StartTime, CONVERT(DATETIME, alal.end_time, 120) AS EndTime, ala.reason as Reason, alal.leave_type as LeaveType, ala.create_time as CreateTime FROM ac_leave_application as ala INNER JOIN ac_leave_application_line as alal ON ala.oa_order = alal.oa_order and ala.version = alal.version where 1 = 1 and DATEDIFF( MONTH, ala.create_time, GETDATE( ) ) <= 3 and ala.oa_order = #{OaOrder} ORDER BY ala.create_time DESC OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT 1 ROWS ONLY

select ala.id, ala.nick_name as NickName, ala.user_name as UserName, ala.oa_order as RequisitionCode, ala.approval_result as State, CONVERT(DATETIME, alal.start_time, 120) AS StartTime, CONVERT(DATETIME, alal.end_time, 120) AS EndTime, ala.reason as Reason, alal.leave_type as LeaveType, ala.create_time as CreateTime FROM ac_leave_application as ala INNER JOIN ac_leave_application_line as alal ON ala.oa_order = alal.oa_order and ala.version = alal.version where 1 = 1

select oa_order as oa_order, leave_type as leave_type, start_time as start_time, end_time as end_time, number as total_number, work_number as work_number, hr_nick_name as hr_nick_name, hr_time as modify_time, create_by as create_by, version as version from ac_leave_application_line as alal where alal.oa_order = #{oaOrder} and alal.enabled_flag = 1 and alal.version = #{version}

select oa_order as oa_order, leave_type as leave_type, CONVERT(varchar(19), start_time, 120) AS start_time, CONVERT(varchar(19), end_time, 120) AS end_time, number as total_number, work_number as work_number, hr_nick_name as hr_nick_name, CONVERT(varchar(19), hr_time, 120) AS hr_time, create_by as create_by, version as version from ac_leave_application_line as alal where alal.oa_order = #{oaOrder} and alal.enabled_flag = 1 and alal.version = #{version} AND alal.id NOT IN
#{item, jdbcType=BIGINT}
select job_name FROM pm_employee_job where employee_id = #{employeeId} and job_main_flag = 1 AND enabled_flag = 1
select dept_id FROM pm_employee_job where employee_id = #{employeeId} and job_main_flag = 1 AND enabled_flag = 1
SELECT * FROM ac_leave_management WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND enabled_flag = 1
mapper.sql:
select
from ac_leave_application ala inner join ac_leave_application_line alal on ala.oa_order = alal.oa_order and ala.version = alal.version

where 1 = 1
and ala.approval_result = #{criteria.approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and alal.start_time BETWEEN #{criteria.beginDate, jdbcType = DATE} and #{criteria.endDate, jdbcType = DATE}
AND ( (YEAR(alal.start_time) <> YEAR(alal.end_time)) OR (YEAR(alal.start_time) = YEAR(alal.end_time) AND MONTH(alal.start_time) <> MONTH(alal.end_time)) ) AND ( (MONTH(alal.start_time) = MONTH(#{criteria.checkMonth}) AND YEAR(alal.start_time) = YEAR(#{criteria.checkMonth}) OR ((MONTH(alal.end_time) = MONTH(#{criteria.checkMonth}) AND YEAR(alal.end_time) = YEAR(#{criteria.checkMonth})) OR (MONTH(alal.start_time) < MONTH(#{criteria.checkMonth}) AND MONTH(alal.end_time) > MONTH(#{criteria.checkMonth}) AND YEAR(alal.start_time) = YEAR(#{criteria.checkMonth})) OR (MONTH(alal.start_time) = MONTH(#{criteria.checkMonth}) AND MONTH(alal.end_time) > MONTH(#{criteria.checkMonth}) AND YEAR(alal.start_time) <= YEAR(#{criteria.checkMonth}) AND YEAR(alal.end_time) >= YEAR(#{criteria.checkMonth})) OR (MONTH(alal.start_time) < MONTH(#{criteria.checkMonth}) AND MONTH(alal.end_time) = MONTH(#{criteria.checkMonth}) AND YEAR(alal.start_time) <= YEAR(#{criteria.checkMonth}) AND YEAR(alal.end_time) >= YEAR(#{criteria.checkMonth})))))
and 1 = 1
and (ala.approval_result = 'Pass' or ala.approval_result = 'notPass' or ala.approval_result = 'Cancel')
and ala.approval_result is null
and (ala.version = 0 or ala.modify_reason is null)
and ala.version > 0
AND ( alal.leave_type != '事假' AND alal.leave_type != '年假' AND alal.leave_type != '调休' )
